evidence.purpose: Parent close evidence mapping all six L70 acceptance gates to shipped substrate and line-cited artifacts
checks: four-lens self-grade includes Joshua 25-year operator rubric

evidence.summary: L70 no-punt chain probe and driver fixtures passed
brand/sniff/jeff/public pass; validator reports flywheel-2p25 open from Dependents scrape while br dep list flywheel-7lby --json returns []

commands.summary: four_lens brand=pass sniff=pass jeff=pass public=pass; verdict=BLOCK_CLOSE due flywheel-2p25 dependent scrape

joshua_lens_depth_check.operator_grade_durability: The closeout checks the failure class that burns real ops time: an orchestrator that knows the next action but waits for another scheduler turn.
joshua_lens_depth_check.team_fit: The receipt and fixture are first-90-days senior ops hire readable: one command proves the chain contract without needing the original worker's context.
joshua_lens_depth_check.company_building_leverage: Same-turn chaining reduces idle pane leakage across the fleet, so the benefit compounds every time a session exhausts one phase and has another actionable phase ready.
joshua_lens_depth_check.turnover_resilience: The evidence is in versioned receipts, executable fixtures, and L70 doctrine, so the contract survives the author leaving the session.
